closeOnClickOutside.description: Whether to close when clicking outside the content, true by default
closeOnClickOutside.name: closeOnClickOutside

controlsProps.description: Props passed to the prev/next controls (LightboxControls)
controlsProps.name: controlsProps

counterProps.description: Props passed to the slide counter (LightboxCounter)
counterProps.name: counterProps

keepMounted.description: Whether to keep content mounted when closed, false by default
keepMounted.name: keepMounted

lockScroll.description: Whether to lock page scroll while open, true by default
lockScroll.name: lockScroll

onClose.description: Called when the lightbox requests to close
onClose.name: onClose

orientation.description: Layout and scroll direction of the lightbox, 'horizontal' by default
orientation.name: orientation

returnFocus.description: Whether to return focus to the trigger on close, true by default
returnFocus.name: returnFocus

slideImageProps.description: Props passed to the slide Image component
slideImageProps.name: slideImageProps

slidesProps.description: Props passed to the slides carousel (LightboxSlides)
slidesProps.name: slidesProps

thumbnailImageProps.description: Props passed to the thumbnail Image component
thumbnailImageProps.name: thumbnailImageProps

thumbnailsProps.description: Props passed to the thumbnails carousel (LightboxThumbnails)
thumbnailsProps.name: thumbnailsProps

trapFocus.description: Whether to trap focus while open, true by default
trapFocus.name: trapFocus

withControls.description: Show prev/next navigation controls, true by default
withControls.name: withControls

withFullscreen.description: Whether to show the fullscreen toggle button in the toolbar, true by default
withFullscreen.name: withFullscreen

withToolbar.description: Show toolbar (zoom, fullscreen, close buttons), true by default
withToolbar.name: withToolbar

withZoom.description: Whether to show the zoom toggle button in the toolbar, true by default
withZoom.name: withZoom

withinPortal.description: Whether to render inside a portal, true by default
withinPortal.name: withinPortal

children.description: Caption displayed below the slide image
children.name: children

size.description: Size of the prev/next navigation buttons in px, 36 by default
size.name: size

formatter.description: Custom formatter for the counter label, (i, t) => \${i + 1} / ${t}\`` by default
formatter.name: formatter
